cleavage agent: Proteolytic cleavage to peptides was carried out by incubating the proteins with a Trypsin/Lys-C protease mix
collision energy: fragmentation by higher-energy collisional dissociation (normalized collision energy: 34)
fractionation method: a comprehensive lipidomics and proteomics analysis of size exclusion chromatography-isolated plasma-derived exosomes
instrument: 1 µg of labeled peptides were injected into an Easy-nLC 1200 coupled to a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
ionization type: Eluting peptides were ionized by electrospray ionization at 3.2 kV
labeling: a TMT-based quantitative proteomics analysis was applied
